match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks smoothly forward at eye level, following Scarlett as she walks steadily along the promenade toward the beach. Her right hand brushes lightly along the low wall with forward momentum while her blonde hair lifts and flows in the breeze. Distant surfers paddle on boards across the rolling ocean waves. Gentle sea breeze stirs the air with soft fabric movement on her clothing and natural footfalls on the paved path.

gentle ocean waves, soft sea breeze, distant water sounds. light footsteps on pavement, fabric rustling.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
